item.name: White Devil Identification Key
item.description: A thin, rectangular piece of what appears to be cermet. Placing it near the White Devil suit of magitek armor will magically bring the machine to life.

mount.name: White Devil
mount.action: Call into battle the White Devil─Livia sas Junius's custom-made battle armor, now <Emphasis>your</Emphasis> custom-made battle armor.
mount.description: This masterpiece of imperial ingenuity is the selfsame suit of warmachina operated by XIVth Legion tribunus Livia sas Junius in the Garlean Empire's subjugation of Othard's southern reaches.
mount.tooltip:
Ever the pessimist,
my dear Livia.
- Nero tol Scaeva
